description: Create a content slide on increasing financial fragility with a two-column layout: a left combo chart showing AI-related US investment grade debt with two percentage trend lines, and a right donut chart showing private credit borrower interest coverage ratios with a callout.

header.headline: Structurally higher interest rates and a potential correction in AI valuations are likely to increase funding stress for many companies, particularly those relying on private credit

left.title: AI-related US investment grade debt
left.body:
$bn (Left), % of index (Right)

Series shown: AI universe index debt (bars, left axis), AI as % of index (line, right axis), and US banks as % of index (line, right axis). X-axis years run from 2020 to 2025. Left axis ranges from $0 to $1,400 and right axis ranges from 0% to 20%. The chart shows steady growth in AI-related debt and rising AI index share over the period.

right.center_label:
Interest coverage ratios of private credit borrowers¹
EBITDA/Interest Expense
